backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the FocusRoom backend with room management, user profiles, session control, WebRTC signaling, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three gratitude card features (display, scratch animation, message cycling) to their implementing frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behavior of each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FocusRoom SPA, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for login, lobby, and room pages, wrapped in a forced-dark ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Blocking modal dialog that forces new users to set a username on first login before accessing the app, using the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Persistent app shell providing a sticky header with logo, auth controls, and username display, a footer with attribution, and conditional rendering of ProfileSetupModal for new users.
frontend/src/components/room/AmbientSoun: A dropdown toggle component that lets users select and play looping ambient sounds (rain, library, white noise) during focus phases, persisting the selection to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/room/CameraPrevi: A camera preview component that manages getUserMedia stream lifecycle, handles permission/device errors with descriptive messages, and notifies a parent via callback when the stream changes.
frontend/src/components/room/ChatPanel.t: A local chat panel that displays and sends messages within a room, blurring all messages during focus phase and storing each message as a backend event.
frontend/src/components/room/Distraction: Shows a fixed warning indicator when the user has been away from the tab for more than 10 seconds during a focus phase, using the Page Visibility API.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalComplet: A modal dialog shown at session end that displays the user's goal and asks whether they completed it, awarding different XP amounts based on the response.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalDisplay: A simple read-only display component that renders the user's current focus goal with a target icon inside a styled card.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalEntryMo: A modal dialog that prompts the user to enter a focus goal before a session starts, with submit and skip options.
frontend/src/components/room/GratitudeCa: Renders a pulsing corner icon button that, when clicked, opens a ScratchCardOverlay to reveal a gratitude message.
frontend/src/components/room/Leaderboard: Renders a sorted leaderboard of session XP for room participants, always including the current user even with 0 XP, with medal icons for the top three.
frontend/src/components/room/Participant: Displays a list of room participants fetched via a query hook, showing camera-active status for local and remote peers using WebRTC stream data.
frontend/src/components/room/ScratchCard: Implements an interactive scratch-card overlay where users scratch a gold canvas surface to reveal a message, auto-revealing after 55% of the area is scratched.
frontend/src/components/room/TimerDispla: Renders an SVG ring progress timer with focus/break/idle phases, a glow animation on focus start, and a start button when idle.
frontend/src/components/room/VideoGrid.t: Displays a responsive grid of blurred live video tiles for local and remote WebRTC streams, with a placeholder shown when no cameras are active.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor using React Query, gating the query on actor availability.
Provides a shuffled, localStorage-persisted cycle of gratitude messages, exposing a getNextMessage function intended to be called after each completed focus session.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for room creation/joining, timer state polling, event storage, and participant fetching against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Provides a mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile to the backend actor and invalidates the cached profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebRTC.ts: Manages WebRTC peer connections for a room, handling offer/answer signaling via the backend, ICE candidate exchange, and remote media stream state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with dark-mode CSS custom properties, and defines custom component/utility classes for blur effects, timer glow, and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page where authenticated users can create a new room or join one by code, with automatic rejoin of the last visited room stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that displays app branding and feature highlights, and triggers Internet Identity authentication via a login button.
frontend/src/pages/RoomPage.tsx: Main room page component that manages a focus/study room session, including timer state, WebRTC peer video, chat, goals, leaderboard, and gratitude card display after each focus session.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors, fonts, shadows, animations) for the FocusRoom app, including focus/break accent colors and dark room-themed palette.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing FocusRoom's existing features (gratitude card scratch animation, shuffled motivational messages) and a pending feature request to surface them after each focus session.
